follow_ups.title: build_lane_plan() still discards file-conflict data — no dependency edges created
follow_ups.description: datum/lane_plan.py:356 uses _ to discard the conflicts return value from build_file_ownership(). Lanes that share a file have no enforced ordering. file_conflict_with in lane-plan.json is purely observational.
follow_ups.suggested_fix: Write tests/test_lane_plan_conflicts.py (RED) first. Then: replace _ with named variable 'conflicts', add 'conflicts: dict[str, list[str]] | None = None' param to build_lane_plan(), add edge logic — for each conflict, later claimant depends on first claimant. Exclude self-edges.

follow_ups.title: skeleton_creator.py write_text() still overwrites — skeleton content destroyed on multi-lane runs
follow_ups.description: Path.write_text() at datum/skeleton_creator.py lines 467, 556, 579 overwrites unconditionally. Root cause of CORR-001 (5 of 6 RED skeletons absent from tests/test_ruff_precheck.py) and CORR-002 (same for tests/test_mypy_precheck.py). Multi-lane runs that share a test file lose prior skeleton content.
follow_ups.suggested_fix: Write tests/test_skeleton_append.py (RED) first. At each of the three write_text() sites: capture content = skeleton.pop('content'), then if dest.exists(): dest.write_text(dest.read_text() + '\n\n' + content) else: dest.write_text(content). Do not modify line 286 (build_impl_stubs write).

follow_ups.title: Test-count grep misses class-based test methods — gate rejects valid GREEN commits
follow_ups.description: skills/src/datum-tdd-act-lane.ts:174 uses grep -c '^+def test_' anchored to column 0. class TestFoo(unittest.TestCase) methods like '+    def test_bar' produce count 0. The TDD gate will reject GREEN commits that use class-based test structure.
follow_ups.suggested_fix: Write tests/test_grep_test_count.py (RED) first. Replace '^+def test_' with '^+[[:space:]]*def test_' at line 174. Verify file-level grep at line 237 is not column-anchored (it is not — already correct). Then rebuild JS (fu-004).

follow_ups.title: JS rebuild needed after task-5 fix — datum-tdd-act-lane.js stale
follow_ups.description: skills/datum-tdd-act-lane.js was rebuilt in run 20260614-161954 but does not include the grep pattern fix (task-5 not completed). Once task-5 TS source is updated, bash scripts/build-workflows.sh must be re-run and the @generated JS verified to contain '^+[[:space:]]*def test_'.
follow_ups.suggested_fix: After fu-003 is fixed: run bash scripts/build-workflows.sh, verify skills/datum-tdd-act-lane.js contains the updated pattern and @generated banner.

follow_ups.title: No new test files committed — TDD RED-GREEN protocol not followed for tasks 1 and 4
follow_ups.description: tasks 1 and 4 shipped fixes without prior failing tests. tests/test_make_function_name.py and tests/test_act_phase_logging.py are absent. Fixes are unverified by automated regression coverage.
